title: fagus procera
intro: Fagus procera is a type of plant, also known as Himalayan beech, which belongs to the family Fagaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat various health conditions. The bark of Fagus procera has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark is often dried and made into a tea or decoction, or used as a powder in capsules or tablets.
